login.headline: Move sales, stock, and receiving from one calm console.
login.description: Puntovivo is built for operators who need checkout speed, stock visibility, and dependable control over purchasing and inventory flow.
login.signInDescription: Use your workstation credentials to access sales, inventory, purchasing, and configuration for the active tenant.
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

protected.loadingDescription: Restoring your session and access rules.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.successDescription: Please sign in again with your new password.
changePassword.requirements: Use a new password with at least 12 characters, plus uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character requirements.
